name: establish-single-search-index-writer
title: Establish Single Search Index Writer
description: Make IndexingRuntime the sole semantic mutation path and one dedicated writer the owner of shared FTS writes and DDL.
scope: IndexingRuntime store boundary, search-index worker/service ownership, File/App FTS mutation migration, DDL readiness, and checkpoint contract
creator: TalexDreamSoul
notes: Production enablement prerequisite: 07-09-gate-search-on-storage-hydration. Development/parity instrumentation may proceed earlier.
